__description: AI-generated reply drafts for SQL review_auto_replies table (ReviewAutoReply ORM). Created by /learn-from-review endpoint. Seeded to pre-populate the review reply queue on fresh install. review_log_id references the position (1-based) of the review in the seeded ReviewLog table.

review_auto_replies.review_log_id: <int: references ReviewLog.id — position in seeded data>
review_auto_replies.customer_name: <string: masked customer name from the review>
review_auto_replies.rating: <int: 1–5 — the star rating of the original review>
review_auto_replies.public_reply: <string: shop's public response visible on platform — polite, brand-toned>
review_auto_replies.inbox_message: <string|null: private DM to customer — only for rating ≤ 3, null for positive>
